_doc: Cross-repo pointer — canonical source is n6-architecture/config/invariants.json (R24+26 formalization). This local nexus copy mirrors the foundation manifest so nexus tools + engine probes can reference it without cross-repo path hardcoding. Keep in sync with upstream via tool/n6_invariants_sync.hexa (TBD).
_mirror_policy: read-only mirror; edits land upstream first, then sync here. If upstream changes schema, this file must be re-generated.
functor_class: faithful cartesian closed symmetric monoidal additive functor F : C_atlas → C_engine

foundation_relations.sopfr_cap: sopfr(6) = 2+3 = 5 → meta-axes {α,β,γ,δ,ε} count (engine-enforced in hexa-lang/tool/roadmap_progress_check.hexa line 298 DO-NOT-ADD-ζ guard)
foundation_relations.banach_depth: Banach contraction depth = n = 6 (R28 arithmetic cap)
foundation_relations.primitive_count: 7 primitives (n, σ, τ, φ, sopfr, J2, μ) → engine structure 7/7 correspondence (R29)

usage: Do NOT edit this file directly. Update upstream n6-architecture/config/invariants.json, then regenerate this mirror. Used by: nexus/.roadmap entry #106 probe verification + any future nexus tool needing foundation atom values.
open_followup_r33_plus: Chorus extension (σ/τ/n/carbon scanners). R26 identified 5 chorus patterns; current engine + witness only tracks meta_fp=1/3. R33+ series to expand.
